title: Unofficial 8BC Client
description: High performance and QOL Mods for the 8bit community server
body:
A mod pack that helps improve Minecraft while adding a feature to make Minecraft more streamlined. The main goal of this modpack is to create a list of mods that would help anyone get into modded clients while still being flexible for them to add or remove mods after installing. 

## 8Bit Server-related stuff

All mods in this pack will be allowed to be used on the server.

It will also require support mods that the server uses:
 - Plasmo voice
 - Axiom
